symptom: drone emits message_chat in phases where only message_result (plus action tools) is allowed; schema filter returns ERROR but drone re-emits message_chat next iteration
root_cause: sigma v8 M8 failure mode #2 — pattern hallucination from adjacent precedents. The base model has message_chat baked in from earlier corpora and emits it in phases where it is structurally blocked; prompt-level errors don't dislodge the trained pattern
fix_approach: dispatch-layer rewrite: message_chat(text, done=true) → message_result(text=...) when message_chat not in allowed schema and message_result is; done=false falls through to the reject path with a dedicated 'skip the status update' message

desc: canonical case — done=true final-output in WRITE phase → rewrite

arguments.text: Phase 1 complete. Updated enemies.json with 3 frost enemies.

expect.final_args_text: Phase 1 complete. Updated enemies.json with 3 frost enemies.

desc: done omitted defaults to true → rewrite
done='true' as string → rewrite (training data sometimes stringifies)
done=false stays untouched (status update — reject path handles it)
message_chat allowed in DELIVER via qa toolbox → no rewrite (legitimate call)
message_result not in allowed → don't rewrite (would just shift failure)
empty text → rewrite still happens (drone may emit message_chat with empty text in DELIVER-like intent)
